body: tracker.load_defined_labels() (tracker.py ~line 605-614) uses 'except Exception:' to swallow all errors reading labels.json. Pylint flags this as broad-exception-caught (W0718). Narrow to the expected failure modes: json.JSONDecodeError, OSError, ValueError. Any other exception should propagate so bugs are surfaced rather than hidden behind an empty dict.
title: narrow broad Exception catch in load_defined_labels
